tables.table_title: Experimental Results on WebShop and ALFWorld Datasets
tables.table_note: The table shows the experimental results on the WebShop and ALFWorld datasets, demonstrating the performance of the proposed framework.

tables.table_title: Comparison to Previous Work on WebShop and ALFWorld Datasets
tables.table_note: The table compares the proposed framework to previous work on the WebShop and ALFWorld datasets, showing an average improvement of 15.6% in accuracy.
